LanguageData.XCOM_Laser.label: laser
LanguageData.XCOM_Laser.description: Batteries and reagents that can power a chemlaser emitter. The reagents generates laser at visible wavelengths.
LanguageData.XCOM_LaserInc.label: infrared laser
LanguageData.XCOM_LaserInc.description: Batteries and reagents that can power a chemlaser emitter. The reagents generates laser at infrared wavelengths, causing burns and start fires.
LanguageData.XCOM_LaserHP.label: untraviolet laser
LanguageData.XCOM_LaserHP.description: Batteries and reagents that can power a chemlaser emitter. The reagents generates laser at untraviolet wavelengths, delivering more energy and causing more damage.
LanguageData.XCOM_LaserEMP.label: EM laser
LanguageData.XCOM_LaserEMP.description: Batteries and reagents that can power a chemlaser emitter. The reagents generates laser at radio wavelengths, disrupting electronic systems.
